login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Continue with SSO or your work email.
login.mfaHint: SAML 2.0 / OIDC · MFA required by tenant policy
login.devLink: Trouble signing in? Use dev-login (non-prod only)
login.footer: By signing in you agree to the Terms · Privacy

dev.title: Dev login
dev.warningBody: Skips SAML / MFA. All actions are still audited under your assumed identity, including any HITL approvals.
dev.errorDisabled: dev-login is disabled in this environment
dev.errorRequest: dev-login request failed (is the backend running?)
